name: My-Store
releaseNotes:
📱 My Store - Major Update Summary v1.3.4

1. 🛠️ Smart Action Buttons

We replaced the old static "Install" button with a dynamic system.
•📥 Install: Shows up if the app is not on your phone.
•🔓 Open: Shows up instantly if the app is already installed.
•🚀 Update: Automatically appears if a newer version is available on the store!
•🗑️ Uninstall: Now you have a dedicated button on the left to remove apps directly.

2. ⚡ Instant Status Refresh (Live Sync)

No more waiting or manual refreshing!
•📡 Broadcast Listener: We added a system-level listener that detects the exact second an app is installed or uninstalled.
•🔄 Real-time UI: The button changes from "Uninstall" to "Install" instantly as soon as the app is removed.

3. 🎯 Precision Package Tracking

We moved away from "guessing" app names to a 100% accurate tracking system.
•🆔 Unique ID: Every app is now tracked using its unique Package Name (e.g., com.dev.myapp).
•🛡️ Error-Free: This ensures that My Store never confuses two different apps with similar names.

4. 🤖 Automated GitHub Workflow (The Brain)

We updated your .yml script to make it "Super Smart."
•🔍 APK Scanner: The script now automatically downloads your APKs, scans them internally using pyaxmlparser, and extracts the real Package Name.
•📑 Auto-JSON: It automatically updates your apps.json every hour with all the correct details.
•⚙️ Zero Manual Work: You just upload your APK to GitHub, and My Store handles the rest!

5. 🛠️ Deep System Integration

•🔓 Permission Granted: Added REQUEST_DELETE_PACKAGES to the Manifest so the system trustfully opens the uninstall dialog.
•🔗 Smart Intents: Used advanced Android Intents to ensure the "Open" and "Uninstall" features work on all Android versions (from old to new).
